title: Colorful Armor
description: A simple cosmetic mod that adds more armor color customization options.
body:
# Colorful Armor

**Colorful Armor** is a simple armor customization mod that allows more armor types to be dyed, giving players extra visual customization options.

The mod is mainly focused on changing the appearance of armor. It does not add a large progression system, custom mobs, structures, quests, or major gameplay mechanics.

---

## Current Features

- Dyeable armor support for more armor types
- Works with multiple dye colors
- Lets players create more personalized armor sets
- Useful for survival, creative, roleplay, and cosmetic-focused modpacks

---

## How It Works

Colorful Armor lets certain armor pieces be colored using dyes.

Depending on the Minecraft version, the exact crafting method or supported armor types may be different. Please check the supported version/files you are using for the correct behavior.

---

## Intended Use

This mod is intended for players and modpacks that want more cosmetic armor variety without changing the game too much.

It can fit well in:

- survival modpacks
- roleplay servers
- cosmetic-focused packs
- creative building worlds
- vanilla-style modpacks

---

## Modpack Use

You are free to include this mod in your modpack.

---

## Development Status

This mod is simple and mainly focused on armor coloring. Some features may vary between Minecraft versions, and support or updates may be limited.

---

## Notes

Colorful Armor is best used as a small cosmetic addon for players who want more armor color options.
